---
title: "Figure 1c"
author: "JuHyeongYu"
date: "2026-03-07"
output: html_document
---
Figure 1c

```{r}
# load required packages

library(dplyr)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(viridis)
library(grid)

# Load the data from Supplementary Data 1

suppl1_a <- read_excel('/Users/zzuhyeong2/Documents/JoonAhn_Lab/Project1/41467_2024_54434_MOESM5_ESM.xlsx', sheet = 1)

# 1. Data Preprocessing
anno_df <- suppl1_a %>%
    arrange(Subtype, desc(Subtype.membership)) %>%
      mutate(
        # a. Subtype
        Subtype = as.character(Subtype),
    
        # b. Subtype Core 
        `Subtype Core` = ifelse(Subtype.membership <= 0.5, "N", "Y"),
    
        # c. Subtype Membership
        `Subtype Membership` = Subtype.membership,
    
        # d. Histology 
        Histology = DX,
    
        # e. Age
        Age = case_when(
          Age == "31-40" ~ 40,
          Age == "41-50" ~ 50,
          Age == "51-60" ~ 60,
          Age == "61-70" ~ 70,
          Age == "71-80" ~ 80,
          Age == "81-90" ~ 90,
          Age == "91-100" ~ 100
        ),
    
        # f. Sex
        Sex = Sex,
    
        # g. Smoking
        Smoking = case_when(
          Smoking.history == "Cr" ~ "Cr",
          Smoking.history == "Ex" ~ "Ex",
          Smoking.history == "N" ~ "N",
          TRUE ~ NA_character_
        ),
    
        # h. TNMstage 
        TNMstage = AJCC.8th.TNMstage,
    
        # i. Pathologic N
        `Pathologic N` = Pathologic.N,
    
        # j. Adjuvant Treatment
        `Adjuvant Treatment` = Adjuvant.Treatment,
    
        # k. Recurrence status
        `Recurrence status` = case_when(
           Recur.status == 1 ~ "Y",
          Recur.status == 0 ~ "N",
          TRUE ~ "NA"
        ),
    
        # l. TIL pattern 
        `TIL pattern` = TIL.pattern,
    
        # m. Immune Cluster
        `Immune Cluster` = case_when(
          Celltype.based.subtype == "Cold_Immunogram" ~ "Cold",
          Celltype.based.subtype == "Hot_Immunogram" ~ "Hot",
          is.na(Celltype.based.subtype) ~ "Unknown",
          TRUE ~ "Unknown"
        ),
    
        # n. Whole Genome Doubling
        `Whole Genome Doubling` = case_when(
          WGD == TRUE ~ "Y",
          WGD == FALSE ~ "N",
          is.na(WGD) ~ "N",
          TRUE ~ "N"
        ),
    
        # o. TP53
        TP53 = case_when(
          TP53 == "Mut+CNV.loss" ~ "Truncating Mutation + CN loss",
          TP53 == "Mutation" ~ "Truncating Mutation",
          TP53 == "Not.altered" ~ "Not altered",
          TRUE ~ as.character(TP53)
        ),
    
        # p. Other Tumor Suppressor genes
        `Other Tumor Suppressor genes` = case_when(
          Other.TSG == "Mut+CNV.loss" ~ "Truncating Mutation + CN loss",
          Other.TSG == "Mutation" ~ "Truncating Mutation",
          Other.TSG == "Not.altered" ~ "Not altered",
          Other.TSG == "CNV.loss" ~ "Copy number loss (CN loss)",
          TRUE ~ as.character(Other.TSG)
          ),
    
        # q. EGFR
        EGFR = case_when(
          EGFR == "exon19_del" ~ "Exon19 del",
          EGFR == "None" ~ "None",
          EGFR == "Others_Indel" ~ "Other Indels",
          EGFR == "Others_SNV" ~ "Other SNVs",
          EGFR == "L858R" ~ "L858R",
          TRUE ~ as.character(EGFR)
        ),
    
        # r. Other oncogene alteration 
        `Other oncogene alteration` = ifelse(
          Other.Oncogene == "KRAS_PIK3CA", 
          "KRAS+PIK3CA", 
          Other.Oncogene
      )) %>%
  
      # s. Annotation order
      select(
        Subtype, `Subtype Core`, `Subtype Membership`, Histology, Age, Sex, 
        Smoking, TNMstage, `Pathologic N`, `Adjuvant Treatment`, `Recurrence status`, 
        `TIL pattern`, `Immune Cluster`, `Whole Genome Doubling`, TP53, 
        `Other Tumor Suppressor genes`, EGFR, `Other oncogene alteration`
      ) %>%
  
  as.data.frame() # ComplexHeatmap input
```

```{r}

# 2. Dynamic Palette Generation

# a. TNM Stage: Continuous color change from yellow to purple
tnm_levels <- c("IA1", "IA2", "IA3", "IB", "IIA", "IIB", "IIIA", "IIIB", "IVA")
tnm_colors <- setNames(viridis(n = length(tnm_levels), direction = -1), tnm_levels)

# b. Histology: Match with Figure 1a
dx_levels <- na.omit(unique(anno_df$Histology))
dx_colors <- setNames(colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(8, "Dark2"))(length(dx_levels)), dx_levels)

# 3. Manual Color List Creation

# a. Continuous color change for TIL Pattern (Ivory -> Dark Brown)

til_colors <- c(
  "absent" = "#DDD1B6",                # Ivory
  "non-brisk multifocal" = "#BFAF95",  # Burlywood (Light Brown)
  "brisk band-like" = "#866038",       # Sienna (Medium Brown)
  "brisk diffuse" = "#5C4028",         # Dark Brown
  "Unknown" = "grey80"                 # Dark Gray
)

# b. Common colors for mutations (TP53, TSG)
mut_colors <- c(
  "Not altered" = "white",
  "Copy number loss (CN loss)" = "#FF6699",               # Rose
  "Truncating Mutation" = "#E6D690",                      # Dark Ivory
  "Truncating Mutation + CN loss" = "#8B4513"             # Brown
)

age_colors <- circlize::colorRamp2(
  c(35, 95),
  c("#F7F7F7", "#252525")
)

# c. Assemble the final comprehensive color list
col_list <- list(
  # Tracks 1~3: Subtype related
  Subtype = c("1"="#FFB6C1", "2"="#E6E6FA", "3"="#FFFACD", "4"="#A8E6CF", "5"="#87CEEB"), # Pink, Light Purple, Yellow, Mint, Sky Blue
  `Subtype Core` = c("Y" = "black", "N" = "white"),
  `Subtype Membership` = colorRamp2(c(0.3, 1), c("#FFF5EE", "#FF8C00")), # Orangey White -> Dark Orange
  
  # d. Tracks 4~10: Clinical Information 1
  Histology = dx_colors,
  Age = age_colors, # Darkening based on age group
  Sex = c("F"="#A6DBEA", "M"="#4A3082"), # Sky Blue, Dark Purple
  Smoking = c("Cr"="#8B4513", "Ex"="#FFA500", "N"="gray95"), # Brown, Orange, Light Gray (distinct from na_col grey90)
  TNMstage = tnm_colors,
  `Pathologic N` = c("N0" = "#E2E2E2", "N1" = "#9A9A71", "N2" = "#B06A73"), # Light Gray, Olive, Dark Rose
  `Adjuvant Treatment` = c("None"="grey80", "CTx"="#5D8AA8", "RTx"="darkred", "CTx & RTx"="#4F3E81"),
  
  # e. Tracks 11~14: Clinical Information 2
  `Recurrence status` = c("Y"="#E17070", "N"="#C0C0C0", "NA" = "grey90"), # Light Rose, Dark Gray
  `TIL pattern` = til_colors,
  `Immune Cluster` = c("Cold"="#5CA6C1", "Hot"="#FFB6C1", "Unknown" = "white"), # Light Blue, Light Rose
  `Whole Genome Doubling` = c("Y"="black", "N"="white"),
  
  # f. Tracks 15~18: Genomic Alterations
  EGFR = c(
    "Exon19 del"   = "#9C373C",
    "Other Indels" = "#D67141",
    "Other SNVs"   = "#4F7FA7",
    "L858R"        = "#ABB14B",
    "None"         = "white"  
  ),
  `Other oncogene alteration` = c(
    "ALK" = "#9D3248","ERBB2" = "#5F3E83", "KRAS" = "#395D54", "PIK3CA" = "#EA6737", "KRAS+PIK3CA" = "#934C31", "MET" = "#706B6D", "ROS1" = "#43408B", "RET" = "#533529", "None" = "white"    
  ),
  TP53 = mut_colors,
  `Other Tumor Suppressor genes` = mut_colors
)

# 4. Annotation Object Creation and Output

# subtype 라벨
subtype_labels <- c(
  "1" = "Subtype 1 \n (n = 55, 24.0%) \n Metabolic",
  "2" = "Subtype 2 \n (n = 45, 19.7%) \n Alveolar-like",
  "3" = "Subtype 3 \n (n = 52, 22.7%) \n Proliferative",
  "4" = "Subtype 4 \n (n = 43, 18.7%) \n Hypoxic",
  "5" = "Subtype 5 \n (n = 34, 14.8%) \n Immunogenic"
)

top_anno <- HeatmapAnnotation(
  df = anno_df,
  subtype_block = anno_block(
    gp = gpar(fill = "white", col = "white", lwd = 1),
    labels = subtype_labels[unique(as.character(anno_df$Subtype))],
    labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 9, fontface = "bold"),
    height = unit(10, "mm")
  ),
  col = col_list,
  gp = gpar(col = "black", lwd = 0.5),
  na_col = "grey80",
  annotation_name_side = "right",
  show_legend = FALSE
)

# 5. Initialize the canvas and force output

heatmap <- Heatmap(matrix(NA, nrow = 1, ncol = nrow(anno_df)), 
        top_annotation = top_anno,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,          
        column_split = anno_df$Subtype,   
        column_gap = unit(2, "mm"),
        show_row_names = FALSE,
        show_heatmap_legend = FALSE,
        rect_gp = gpar(col = NA, fill = NA),
        height = unit(0.01, "mm"),
        column_title = NULL)

```

```{r}

# 6. Individual legends

lgd_subtype <- Legend(
  title = "Subtype",
  at = names(col_list$Subtype),
  legend_gp = gpar(fill = col_list$Subtype),
  ncol = 1,
  border = "black"
)

lgd_subtype_core <- Legend(
  title = "Subtype Core",
  at = c("Y", "N"),
  legend_gp = gpar(fill = col_list$`Subtype Core`[c("Y", "N")]),
  ncol = 1,
  border = "black"
)

subtype_membership_breaks <- rev(c(0.3, 0.5, 0.7, 1.0))
subtype_membership_cols <- col_list$`Subtype Membership`(subtype_membership_breaks)

lgd_subtype_membership <- Legend(
  title = "Subtype\nMembership",
  at = c("1", " ", " ", "0.3"),
  legend_gp = gpar(fill = subtype_membership_cols),
  ncol = 1,
  border = "black")

lgd_histology <- Legend(
  title = "Histology",
  at = names(col_list$Histology),
  legend_gp = gpar(fill = col_list$Histology),
  ncol = 1,
  border = "black"
)

age_legend_cols <- rev(c("#F7F7F7", "#BDBDBD", "#737373", "#252525"))

lgd_age <- Legend(
  title = "Age",
  at = c("90", "", "", "30"),
  legend_gp = gpar(fill = age_legend_cols),
  ncol = 1,
  border = "black"
)

lgd_sex <- Legend(
  title = "Sex",
  at = names(col_list$Sex),
  legend_gp = gpar(fill = col_list$Sex),
  ncol = 1,
  border = "black"
)

lgd_smoking <- Legend(
  title = "Smoking",
  at = names(col_list$Smoking),
  legend_gp = gpar(fill = col_list$Smoking),
  ncol = 1,
  border = "black"
)

lgd_tnm <- Legend(
  title = "TNM Stage",
  at = names(col_list$TNMstage),
  legend_gp = gpar(fill = col_list$TNMstage),
  ncol = 1,
  border = "black"
)

lgd_pathN <- Legend(
  title = "Pathologic N",
  at = names(col_list$`Pathologic N`),
  legend_gp = gpar(fill = col_list$`Pathologic N`),
  ncol = 1,
  border = "black"
)

lgd_adj <- Legend(
  title = "Adjuvant Treatment",
  at = names(col_list$`Adjuvant Treatment`),
  legend_gp = gpar(fill = col_list$`Adjuvant Treatment`),
  ncol = 1,
  border = "black"
)

lgd_recur <- Legend(
  title = "Recurrence Status",
  at = names(col_list$`Recurrence status`),
  legend_gp = gpar(fill = col_list$`Recurrence status`),
  ncol = 1,
  border = "black"
)

lgd_immune <- Legend(
  title = "Immune Cluster",
  at = names(col_list$`Immune Cluster`),
  legend_gp = gpar(fill = col_list$`Immune Cluster`),
  ncol = 1,
  border = "black"
)

lgd_til <- Legend(
  title = "TIL Pattern",
  at = names(col_list$`TIL pattern`),
  legend_gp = gpar(fill = col_list$`TIL pattern`),
  ncol = 1,
  border = "black"
)

lgd_wgd <- Legend(
  title = "WGD",
  at = c("Y", "N"),
  legend_gp = gpar(fill = col_list$`Whole Genome Doubling`[c("Y", "N")]),
  ncol = 1,
  border = "black"
)

lgd_tp53 <- Legend(
  title = "TP53",
  at = names(col_list$TP53),
  legend_gp = gpar(fill = col_list$TP53),
  ncol = 1,
  border = "black"
)

lgd_tsg <- Legend(
  title = "Other Tumor\nSuppressor Genes",
  at = names(col_list$`Other Tumor Suppressor genes`),
  legend_gp = gpar(fill = col_list$`Other Tumor Suppressor genes`),
  ncol = 1,
  border = "black"
)

lgd_egfr <- Legend(
  title = "EGFR",
  at = names(col_list$EGFR),
  legend_gp = gpar(fill = col_list$EGFR),
  ncol = 1,
  border = "black"
)

lgd_oncogene <- Legend(
  title = "Other oncogene alteration",
  at = names(col_list$`Other oncogene alteration`),
  legend_gp = gpar(fill = col_list$`Other oncogene alteration`),
  ncol = 2, nrow = 4,
  border = "black"
)
```

```{r}

# 7. Pack legends by columns

col1 <- packLegend(
  lgd_subtype,
  direction = "vertical",
  gap = unit(3, "mm")
)

col2 <- packLegend(
  lgd_subtype_core,
  lgd_subtype_membership,
  direction = "vertical",
  gap = unit(5, "mm")
)

col3 <- packLegend(
  lgd_histology,
  lgd_age,
  direction = "vertical",
  gap = unit(5, "mm")
)

col4 <- packLegend(
  lgd_sex,
  lgd_smoking,
  direction = "vertical",
  gap = unit(5, "mm")
)

col5 <- packLegend(
  lgd_tnm,
  direction = "vertical",
  gap = unit(3, "mm")
)

col6 <- packLegend(
  lgd_pathN,
  lgd_adj,
  direction = "vertical",
  gap = unit(5, "mm")
)

col7 <- packLegend(
  lgd_recur,
  lgd_immune,
  direction = "vertical",
  gap = unit(5, "mm")
)

col8 <- packLegend(
  lgd_til,
  lgd_wgd,
  direction = "vertical",
  gap = unit(5, "mm")
)

col9 <- packLegend(
  lgd_tp53,
  lgd_tsg,
  direction = "vertical",
  gap = unit(5, "mm")
)

col10 <- packLegend(
  lgd_egfr,
  lgd_oncogene,
  direction = "vertical",
  gap = unit(5, "mm")
)

# Final packing

legend_row <- packLegend(
  col1, col2, col3, col4, col5,
  col6, col7, col8, col9, col10,
  direction = "horizontal",
  gap = unit(8, "mm")
)

```


```{r}

# 8. Plotting

png("Figure_1c.png", width = 5000, height = 2500, res = 300)

# heatmap grob
ht_grob <- grid.grabExpr(
  draw(heatmap, newpage = FALSE)
)

grid.newpage()

pushViewport(viewport(
  layout = grid.layout(
    nrow = 2, ncol = 1,
    heights = unit.c(unit(0.60, "npc"), unit(0.40, "npc"))
  )
))

# heatmap + label 
pushViewport(viewport(layout.pos.row = 1))
grid.draw(ht_grob)

upViewport()

# legend
pushViewport(viewport(layout.pos.row = 2))
draw(
  legend_row,
  x = unit(0.02, "npc"),
  y = unit(0.98, "npc"),
  just = c("left", "top")
)
upViewport(2)

dev.off()
```
